step_rationale: Endothelial microparticles bearing tissue factor; initiate extrinsic coagulation pathway.
mechanism: CD144+TF+ microparticles from activated endothelium carry tissue factor to trigger thrombin generation and fibrin deposition.

references.title: Microparticles during long-term follow-up after acute myocardial infarction. Association to atherosclerotic burden and risk of cardiovascular events.
